title: hieracium multidens
side_effects: Hieracium multidens can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and stomach ulcers due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. Prolonged exposure to the plant's active compounds can also lead to allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues. In severe cases, improper use of Hieracium multidens may cause liver damage and kidney failure, highlighting the importance of careful handling and preparation. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Hieracium multidens for any health purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
